findings.message:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract Exchange (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#228-350) has payable functions:
	 - Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#269-310)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
findings.name: locked-ether

findings.message:
Oracle._changeMinimumQuorum(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#207-211) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newQuorum >= 0 && newQuorum <= 100,Quorum must be between 0 and 100) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#209)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message:
Wallet.changeMinimumQuorum(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#708-715) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newQuorum >= 0 && newQuorum <= 100,Quorum must be between 0 and 100) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#710)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#786-790) contains a tautology or contradiction:
	- require(bool,string)(newExchangeFee >= 0 && newExchangeFee <= 100,Fee must be between 0 and 100) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#788)
findings.name: tautology

findings.message:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256).data (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#281) is written in both
	(success,data) = address(oracleContract).staticcall(abi.encodeWithSignature(isSupported(string),targetCurrency)) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#281-283)
	(success,data) = address(oracleContract).staticcall(abi.encodeWithSignature(readRate(string),targetCurrency)) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#291-293)
findings.name: write-after-write

findings.message:
Wallet.updateMaximumRateDelay(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#777-780) should emit an event for: 
	- maximumRateDelay = newMaximumRateDelay (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#779)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Wallet.updateExchangeFee(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#786-790) should emit an event for: 
	- exchangeFee = newExchangeFee (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#789)
findings.name: events-maths

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.withdrawn(uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#481-487):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#484)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Withdrawal(msg.sender,amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#486)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.withdrawnAUTH(address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#576-595):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#592)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Withdrawal(from,amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#594)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.externalTransfer(uint256,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#432-438):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = to.call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#435)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- ExternalTransfer(msg.sender,to,amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#437)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Reentrancy in Wallet.externalTransferAUTH(uint256,address,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#515-528):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = to.call{value: amount}() (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#525)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- ExternalTransfer(from,to,amount) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#527)
findings.name: reentrancy-events

findings.message:
Exchange.exchange(address,string,address,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#269-310) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- block.timestamp - exchangeRateTime > maximumRateDelay (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#298)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Oracle.answerRequest(uint256,uint256) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#102-146) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- requests[id].requestTime < exchangeRateTime[requests[id].currency] (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#120)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Oracle._removeOracle(string,address) (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#182-201) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- delete currencies[symbol] (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#196)
findings.name: costly-loop

findings.message:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (../sb/Wallet_F.sol#8)
findings.name: solc-version
